wither_dead.title: Defeat the Wither Storm — approach the center mass at X:0 Z:0 and destroy the command block within

survived.title: Survive the Wither Storm fight with full inventory intact — plan the escape route before engagement

subtitle.text: X:0 Z:0. It has been there since the world loaded. Every chapter, it has been waiting. This is the chapter.

description: CH.12 · THE STORM AT ZERO
▸ Cracker's Wither Storm has been at X:0 Z:0
since the world generated.
Every chapter, it absorbed blocks.
Every mob near it was absorbed.
Every player who approached too close
learned the absorption range the hard way.
This is Ch12. Go to X:0 Z:0.
◈ WITHER STORM MECHANICS
└ Absorption field: pulls mobs and blocks inward
Radius increases as it absorbs more material
└ The command block is at the center of the mass
It is the core. Destroy it to kill the Storm.
└ Getting to the core: requires fighting through
the outer mass of absorbed material
└ Direct combat: the Storm entity itself
is extremely high HP — target the command block
◈ FIGHT PREPARATION
└ Armor: Full Ignitium or Emulator gear minimum
└ Potions: Strength II + Resistance II + Fire Resistance
└ Totem of Undying × 2 (off-hand swap on first death)
└ Revive Crystal: keep in inventory
└ ISS spells: Ender Blink for escape from absorption
(Blink ignores pull — critical mobility)
└ Entry vector: approach from above (Storm primarily
pulls horizontally — vertical approach reduces risk)
◈ THE CURSED EYE CONNECTION
└ Wither Storm + Scarlet King = Manifestor Trap
└ The Cursed Eye requires the Storm's presence
as part of the Manifestor Trap mechanic
└ Do not destroy the Storm until AFTER the Cursed Eye
has been acquired (Manifestor Trap must complete first)
▸ The previous civilization aimed it at the center
because they wanted something at the center.
They wanted to break it.
They did not break it.
You are at the center.
The Storm is aimed at you.
▶ Defeat the Wither Storm [check]
▶ Survive the fight with inventory intact [check]
◇ Complete the Cursed Eye (Manifestor Trap) FIRST.
Then destroy the Wither Storm.
Order matters — the Storm's destruction ends
the Manifestor cycle that produces the Eye.
